item.title: It’s almost like fascism is the same thing in just different hues

item.title: You actually have to be kidding me
item.description:
You actually have to be kidding me. I can’t believe they posted this. #greenscreenvideo

item.title: Hyper fixating on when this administration ends or what blue fascist will take their place is not helpful and actually extremely...
item.description:
Hyper fixating on when this administration ends or what blue fascist will take their place is not helpful and actually extremely dangerous

item.title: Replying to Chris I get that it is hard to get elected in Texas telling the truth, it is infuriating that every time I point thi...
item.description:
Replying to Chris I get that it is hard to get elected in Texas telling the truth, it is infuriating that every time I point this out I’m treated as not understanding the system



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Dont lee thiss be a moment, make it a movement
item.description:
Dont lee thiss be a moment, make it a movement. There r people with MUCH better advice than i on this topic but whats improtant is u start local, and build the community needed to support eachother #mutualaid #communitybuilding #leftist #classconciousness



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
